channel.title: ALM on Ibrahim Stephenson
channel.description: Recent content in ALM on Ibrahim Stephenson

item.title: Nobody talks about this
item.description: There are a hundred videos about ALM. How to run a pipeline, which branching strategy to pick, the best way to structure your deployments. I have watched most of them. But almost nobody talks about how to structure your solutions.

item.title: How I Built a Proper ALM Pipeline for Power Platform (Starting From Chaos)
item.description:
I used to dread our sprint deployments.

Every two weeks we deployed our solutions. Individually. Unmanaged. One person’s change overwrote someone else’s. Hotfixes, redeployments, environment restorations. It was chaos. Unmanaged chaos.

This is how I fixed it, and what it cost me.
